medusaFix: Explicit Medusa clicks and locks in the prematch character selector now submit through CmdTrySelectCharacter and reapply Medusa player/QMD state; default QueueMatched data no longer forces Medusa without explicit selection.
queueFix: Lobby players default unready; stale duplicate lobby memberships are removed before creating matchmaking lobbies; stale client InQueue UI is repaired only after remote queue is idle.
